top_blockers: Leadership & Vision (Strategic Alignment) represents a structural execution risk. The current maturity score of 1.75/5 (Nascent) indicates that without named ownership and a defined measurement cadence, AI scaling in this domain will stall at proof-of-concept. Prioritize a 30-day sprint to assign an accountable executive and establish a north-star KPI.
next_best_actions: Validate 2 high-score area(s) with low confidence (W1, W3): request one concrete artifact per question — a policy document, a dashboard screenshot, or a named system — within the next 10 business days.
Assign named executive owners across 5 category(ies) (Data Readiness, Governance Readiness, Leadership & Vision). No area without a named owner and a defined 90-day KPI should be rated above 3/5.
Define a single north-star KPI for each unmeasured dimension. 17 question response(s) contain no measurable outcome. Without measurement, maturity claims are unverifiable.
Resolve score-evidence contradictions in W1, W3. A score of 4–5 cannot coexist with manually executed or informal processes. Either upgrade the process or revise the self-assessment downward.

Schedule a 60-minute structured interview with the respondent. Multiple low-confidence findings require live validation before this assessment can be used to inform investment or strategic planning decisions.

hybrid_analyst.zscore_interpretation: This respondent sits 1.8 SD below the Tech Lead cohort. Significant pessimism relative to peers — either genuine underperformance or a highly critical respondent. Cross-reference with other respondent data.

hybrid_analyst.benchmark_note: Compared against 10 Tech Lead respondents in a 50-person synthetic benchmark. Respondent composite (2.88) vs role avg (3.29). Z-score: -1.76.
